title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Sergeant Frog and his team are completely out of cash to conquer the planet. So, they decide to enter the Anime industry to earn some quick money.

title: Robotan
desc: Robotan, a robot from outer space, visits Earth and makes friends with a young boy. Whenever his new friend gets in trouble or goes on an adventure, Robotan is on hand to help.

desc: Robotan, a robot from outer space, visits Earth and makes friends with a young boy. Whenever his new friend gets in trouble or goes on an adventure, Robotan is on hand to help.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: When the Dokutake ninjas try invading an enemy castle, their efforts are rendered fruitless. As a result, Hieta Happousai tries to abate his lord's anger.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Denshichi and Sakichi are met by bandits whilst trying to cross the bridge. Afterwards, they are robbed of their belongings.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Doi sensei abruptly announces a mathematical examination which leaves the classroom ambience chaotic. Meanwhile, Kirimaru is confident of his success.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Suzugouya Yoshirou visits Yamada sensei from the Fuuma Ninjutsu Academy. However, upon meeting, he regards Yamada sensei as his father.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Hama Shuichirou from Hodo Hodo Castle is met again by Rantarou and the others. Afterwards, they discuss a curious fact about the castle.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Shouzaemon, who calmly likes to analyse everything, asks the boisterous Nanamatsu senpai to understand his own feelings by observing the former.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, a young boy who wants to be a ninja, goes to a special school, where he makes friends and engages in a number of misadventures.

title: Black Clover
desc: An unexpected and formidable adversary disrupts the Underwater Temple battle, forcing Yami and his team to confront this new threat's extraordinary power.

title: Black Clover
desc: Asta and Kiato hurry to assist their teammates as Vetto defeats Magna, Luck and Gio. Later, Gauche confronts several of the mage's skilled followers and needs to think creatively.

title: Black Clover
desc: Two boys, who are raised in the same church, compete against each other and overcome various challenges to become the next Wizard King.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: The flying space-cycle Sergeant Frog purchased turns out to be a dud. So, Kululu lends Natsumi a pair of wings for a late-night rescue mission.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: A group of alien frog invaders attempt to conquer Earth. However, they struggle to make their plans come to fruition and encounter various troubles.

title: Black Clover
desc: An injured Asta continues his fight against Vetto. Later, Vanessa and Finral decide to assist him in the ongoing battle.

title: Black Clover
desc: Vetto remains a difficult target despite the threat of Asta's anti-magic sword. As they guide Asta's attacks, Vanessa and Finral recall the struggles they faced to become stronger mages.

title: Black Clover
desc: Vetto breaks Asta's arm, but the latter continues the fight. Meanwhile, Yami intervenes between them and Vetto recalls his youth.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Momoka, Koyuki, and Keroro have a fierce competition to decide who will get to accompany the Hinata family on their trip.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Sergeant Keroro and his group are eager to celebrate Natsumi's birthday. However, she claims that she does not like to receive gifts as they are childish.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Sergeant Frog takes extreme steps to prepare his soldiers for the harsh winter attack. Meanwhile, Keroro simply receives his bonus cheque.

desc: Robotan, a robot from outer space, visits Earth and makes friends with a young boy. Whenever his new friend gets in trouble or goes on an adventure, Robotan is on hand to help.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: A letter arrives from Doi sensei instructing Shinbei's father to attend a secret Parents' Day where the guardians must discreetly observe the activities of their wards.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: After Shinbei recommends an udon shop, Yuki, Tomomi and Oshige decide to pay it a visit. However, on arriving they find the shop owner and Makinosuke arguing.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Kingo, who has been learning under the tutelage of Tobe sensei, enters the infirmary where Rantarou and the others are present.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, a young boy who wants to be a ninja, goes to a special school, where he makes friends and engages in a number of misadventures.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: When a group race competition is organised, Rantarou, Kirimaru and Shinbei participate in it but plan to use a shortcut.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, Kirimaru and Shinbei eat dango and observe Andou sensei returning to Ninjutsu Academy whilst practising his puns.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Shousei arrives to teach the application of firearms at the Ninjutsu Academy. There, he receives the utmost respect from Torawaka.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: The Dining Hall Lady's lunch draws in Kitaishi Teruyo, who is later treated to Ooki Masanosuke's pickled chinese onions.

desc: Naruto Uzumaki, a headstrong adolescent who seeks approval and acceptance, trains to overcome various challenges and become the village Hokage.

desc: When the Hinata family forgets to be scared of the lonely ghost who haunts their cellar, bath time becomes a hair-raising experience.

desc: As a new member of the Black Bulls, Asta is absolutely chuffed to receive his very first private room as Magna shows him around the squad's headquarters.

title: Black Clover
desc: The Magic Knights are heroes that everyone dreams of becoming one day. However, new recruit, Asta, has yet to do anything that seems like what a Magic Knight should be doing.

desc: On Yami's orders, Asta and Noelle go on their first mission with Magna to hunt wild boars. After completing the mission they visit Saussy Village to meet with the headman, Seyhe.
